title: nie-monero address_for_session: minor index derived from first 4 UUID bytes; UUID v4 has fixed bits in bytes 6-7 (version/variant), so those bytes provide less entropy — use bytes 0-3 which are fully random in v4
close_reason: False positive: bytes 0-3 of UUIDv4 are fully random; version nibble is at byte 6. The concern is unfounded.
